song_name: Sia - Elastic Heart - Ellie Goulding - Love Me Like You Do Mashup
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
| [ch]G[/ch]     | [ch]D[/ch]     | [ch]A[/ch]     | [ch]Bm[/ch]     |  x2


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
 And another one bites the dust[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]    [ch]Bm[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
 Oh, why can I not conquer love?[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]
And I might have thought that we were one[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]          [ch]Bm[/ch]
 Wanted to fight this war without weapons[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
 And I wanted it, I wanted it bad[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]
But there were so many red flags[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
 Now another one bites the dust[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]
 Now, let's be clear, I'll trust no one[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]Bm[/ch]
 You did not break me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]
 I'm still fighting for peace[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
Well I've got thick skin and an elastic heart[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]
But your blade, it might be too sharp[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]
I'm like a rubber band until you pull too hard[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bm[/ch]
But, I may snap and I move close[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]
You won't see me fall apart[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]
'Cause I've got an elastic heart[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]
I've got an elastic heart, mmm[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]
Yeah, I've got an elastic heart, ooh[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]
So love me like you do, la-la-love me like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]
Love me like you do, la-la-love me like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
Touch me like you do, ta-ta-touch me like you do, woah[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bm[/ch]
What are you waiting for?[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]
Oh, oh-oh, hmm-hmmm[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
I'm too hot, huh[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]
Called a police and a fireman[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
I'm too hot[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bm[/ch]
Make a dragon wanna retire, man[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
I'm too hot[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]
Say my name, you know who I am[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
I'm too hot[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]
I'm too hot[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
Saying why were you creeping out late last night[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]
Why did I see two shadows moving in your bedroom light[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
Now you're dressed in black[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]D[/ch]
When I left you were dressed in white[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]
Can you fill me in[/tab]

Can you fill me in


[Interlude]
| [ch]G[/ch]     | [ch]D[/ch]     | [ch]A[/ch]     | [ch]Bm[/ch]     |


[Tag]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]
I've got an elastic heart[/tab]
